raw.title: Hungry for Democracy
raw.excerpt: What if we approached solutions to the worsening food crisis as a struggle for democracy?

llm_processed.summary: The article discusses how democratic participation and grassroots movements can address hunger and inequality, linking food systems to broader social justice and community empowerment.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Bridges to open science by showing how decentralized decision-making can foster inclusive, transparent systems for resource distribution.
